title: Rich Dad's Guide to Real Estate Investing
subtitle: What the Rich Invest In, That the Poor and Middle Class Do Not!

authors.name: Robert T. Kiyosaki
authors.role: Author, investor, entrepreneur. Creator of the Rich Dad brand. Co-authored with Sharon L. Lechter.

authors.name: Sharon L. Lechter
authors.role: Co-author and CFO of the Rich Dad Company. Certified Public Accountant. Co-writer of multiple Rich Dad titles.

rationale: Unconventional addition to the real-estate-investing subcategory: the Rich Dad philosophy challenges mainstream financial orthodoxy by treating real estate as the primary vehicle for escaping the Employee quadrant, promoting leverage as a strategic tool rather than a risk, and centering cash flow over capital appreciation. This book exists alongside more conventional real estate texts and introduces a contrarian, deal-making perspective that recognizes beginners from a different starting point than traditional institutional texts.
